---
applyTo: "**"
---

# General Coding Instructions

## Code Style
- Write clear, readable, and maintainable code.
- Use descriptive variable and function names.
- Keep functions small and focused on a single responsibility.

## Documentation
- Add comments to explain non-obvious logic.
- Document public APIs and functions with concise descriptions.

## Error Handling
- Always handle errors explicitly; avoid silent failures.
- Provide meaningful error messages to aid debugging.

## Testing
- Write tests for new functionality before or alongside implementation.
- Ensure edge cases are covered in test scenarios.
